name: LED On
description: Turns the aircraft arm LEDs on. Uses port 40007 (different from the standard 40009 DUMPL port on smart controllers) or the same bulk endpoint on USB. Requires DJI Fly running with the aircraft connected on smart controllers. Sends the command twice with a 500ms delay for reliability.
source: Captured via loopback on a smart controller — LED control uses a wrapped DUMPL frame (8-byte outer header [0x55][0xCC][0x30][0x75][4-byte LE length] + inner frame) on port 40007.
